case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. VS. VICTOR PEREZ-VARELA

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ-VARELA, VICTOR $324.16 PRINCIPAL, $114.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $438.46, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

ORDER TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE. THE JUDGMENT IN THIS CASE ENTERED IN FAVOR OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT.(PLAINTIFF) AGAINST DEFENDANT(VICTOR PEREZ-VARELA)IS HEREBY VACATED AND THE CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ-VARELA, VICTOR JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
